data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the enforcement of quiet hours.
data.assessment: The step aims to validate the behavior of the system during quiet hours (no SMS from 10pm-8am), but the evidence does not provide explicit confirmation of how this restriction is enforced. While the expected result mentions capturing traces and snapshots, there are no concrete examples or API responses that demonstrate the system's behavior during the specified quiet hours. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No explicit confirmation of enforcement of quiet hours (no SMS 10pm-8am).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the quiet hours enforcement.
